title: Entomophobia
description: Entomophobia is a bug-themed infection mod! Fight against parasitic arthropodic mobs as you attempt to reclaim your land from the hordes!
body:
Welcome to **_Entomophobia_**!

**_Entomophobia_** (meaning, "Fear of Bugs") is a bug-themed infection mod, aimed to add numerous themed arthropodic hostile mobs to your world, with the sole goal of infection and consumption! Large, fast, hostile, and sprouting various insect body parts, these massive hexapods will swarm you and attempt to overpower you with sheer numbers.

**Systems**:
- **Infection**

After a few days in your world, random mobs will be afflicted with Myiasis, which will shortly after kill them, converting them into their Myiatic form. These infected variants will attempt to spread out and kill more mobs, amassing a horde


- **Hivemind**

These mobs act like a hivemind. If you strike one, all nearby myiatics in a large area will target you. I plan to expand this hivemind system in the future, allowing them to group together in swarms and build nests.



**Important Info**:

This mod requires **Geckolib (4.8.3+)**

This mod is VERY early in development. Everything is subject to change. If you found a bug, have a suggestion, a question, or just want to hang out, feel free to drop by our discord! (https://discord.gg/HpQgae6kqh)
